allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['severity'], f['id'], f['summary']\) for f in data['findings'] if f['severity'] in \('Critical','Warning'\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); findings=[f for f in data['findings'] if f['severity'] in \('Critical','Warning'\)]; print\(f'Critical/Warning: {len\(findings\)}'\); [print\(f['severity'], f['id'], f['summary']\) for f in findings]")
